title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Crossword Bookstores

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Crossword Bookstores
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
